message:
test(error-boundary): add 9 unit tests for widget error boundary

Cover max_recovery_attempts builder, widget_name accessor, recovering
state error accessor, try_recover on healthy, unreachable prefix
stripping, default state, custom boundary builder, FallbackWidget::new,
and panic-during-recovery behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
